raw_consumer_statement: I am submitting this complaint as a follow-up to my prior CFPB complaint regarding Citi dispute ID XXXX. On XX/XX/year>, Citi Bank responded to my previous complaint and requested additional information concerning this dispute, including whether a credit slip was provided by the merchant and details regarding the merchant 's return policy. I am providing the requested information and supporting documentation through the CFPB portal to ensure there is a documented record confirming Citi 's receipt of these materials. The attached documents show that the merchant approved my return, provided a prepaid return label, received the returned merchandise, and subsequently confirmed that a full refund would be processed within 3 to 5 days. Despite these representations, no refund was ever issued. I respectfully request that Citi review the attached information, reconsider its prior decision, and provide a written response addressing the evidence submitted.
